title: Downloading data from a project Management high level board
excerpt: how can one download  high-level board data into excel , the excel distorts data since the high-level board uses connect board and mirrored column

posts.author: euniceNM1 (Includovate )
posts.cookedHtml: how can one download high-level board data into excel , the excel distorts data since the high-level board uses connect board and mirrored column

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Sorry to hear your export is distorting data - this sounds a little strange!

Would you be happy to share a screenshot if possible (providing no confidential data is shared)? Alternatively, can you share where the data is distorting? Thank you

posts.author: euniceNM1 (Includovate )
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @BiancaT ,
Please note;Thanks. Please find the output from Excel. Please note on Monday’s board, it provides the summation from the low-level board, which is perfectly okay with us. The challenge arises when we download all the figures pulled from the low-level board. Please find the screens from Excel.
